# Frontend Specs

## Overview

This is a hands-on experiment in working on Agentic AI frontend development with zero initial knowledge of frontend or game design.

Specs will be written prior to development—partly handcrafted, and partly generated with AI. This page serves as a table of contents for the frontend specs that begin after defining the types and API wrapper. It also tracks the progress of the frontend development to prevent agents from reading completed or obsolete specs.

## Workflow

**Always Human-in-the-loop**: The human owns the domain knowledge and the specs. Agents produce the code. The human verifies the code and learns the technical details behind it.

1. Copy [SPEC_TEMPLATE.md](SPEC_TEMPLATE.md).
2. Follow the template and fill in the blanks.
3. Work with and verify using AI agents. Learn from the output.
